description: Northflank is a cloud application platform for building, deploying, and operating services, jobs, databases, and related infrastructure. It supports deploying workloads, managing environments and pipelines, and operating resources through its web app and programmatic tooling.
summary: Northflank exposes a documented HTTP API and an npm-distributed CLI, both authenticated with Northflank-issued API tokens; no public GraphQL API or MCP server was found.
